sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74878" key="o)ressi/futos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεσσῐ´-φῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74878.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing on mountains,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥίζα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:44:272" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.272</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
